references.name: Amnesty International
references.takeaway: Use an urgency-yellow (#FDFF28) as the primary accent color for highlight strips and call-to-action bands, pairing it with condensed all-caps headlines at maximum width to create the visual volume of a protest placard.
applied: Electric yellow (#e6ff00) used as secondary accent for stat numbers, spray-paint headers, vote counts, and highlight marker streaks on nav hover — matching the urgency-yellow accent strategy
Impact font headlines rendered in all-caps with tight letter-spacing (3-5px) and fluid clamp() sizing from 22px to 64px, mimicking the condensed protest placard volume
Full-width accent-colored banner with torn-edge clip-path on dashboard slogan creating the bold CTA band treatment
Stat tiles with accent-colored top bars and bold stat-number typography in yellow creating the data-forward urgency feel

references.name: Extinction Rebellion
references.takeaway: Structure the page as a numbered manifesto with 3-5 bold declarations, each separated by full-width woodcut-style illustrated bands that feel hand-printed rather than digitally generated.
applied: Dashboard organized as manifesto-style sections: stat declarations at top, recent dispatches, and urgent action demands — each section stamped with hand-drawn dividers
Project workspace uses ransom-header style section labels (clip-path torn blocks) as manifesto-style declaration markers
Rough.js used for hand-drawn connector lines on whiteboard and conspiracy board views, creating the woodcut/hand-printed texture
Spray-paint headers and stamp-style status badges throughout create the hand-printed rather than digitally-generated aesthetic

references.name: 350.org
references.takeaway: Stack full-width campaign blocks vertically with alternating background treatments (photo, solid color, dark), and embed live counter elements (numbers, progress bars, deadlines) to create the urgency rhythm of an activist broadsheet.
applied: Dashboard stat grid with 6 counter tiles showing live numbers (14,287 signatures, 42 campaigns, $127K raised) with animated progress bars — directly mirroring the live counter urgency pattern
Urgent actions section with deadline callouts (FEB 20, NEEDS 500 MORE, TOMORROW 9AM) in accent red, matching the deadline urgency treatment
Projects view stacks campaign flyers vertically on mobile with alternating torn-edge treatments and progress bars, creating the broadsheet campaign-block rhythm
Project workspace timeline with checked/pending markers creating the live action-progress cadence
